creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
John,
Its a nice idea and has a certain elegance as an approach, but I feel that this will create more work both now and in the future as it increases the coupling of the port's Makefiles and files/* with the application developer's approach.  Upstream folks ought to take care of things like stripping.  Quite a few port maintainers currently walk the extra yard to modify the application developers' Makefile &/or configure scripts because it is necessary to get it to build/work.  The extra effort on your part to improve this area for consistency, and that of subsequent maintainers, probably isn't going to realise sufficient benefit.
